title: CK-12 Geometry FlexBooks
description: A link-only discovery card for CK-12 geometry textbooks and study resources.
license: CK-12 Curriculum Materials License · link-only catalog use

usagePolicy.reason: CK-12 currently restricts content aggregation and AI/ML use without permission.

pages.text: CK-12 geometry materials cover reasoning and proof, congruence, similarity, polygons, circles, area, volume, coordinate geometry, and transformations.
Open CK-12 FlexBooks and search for Geometry, then select the course version that matches local standards.
Link only: CK-12 curriculum text is not mirrored or sent to AlloFlow AI features. Open the official CK-12 site to read, customize, or assign the material.
